---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to lafbot
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem you're trying to solve

Not the feature you want — the underlying need. Example: "I want to research topics where YouTube has no coverage" is the problem; "add Reddit as a source" is one possible solution.

## What's missing in the current pipeline

Why doesn't `/lafbot` or `/lafbot drill` already solve this for you?

## Proposed solution

What you think should happen. Diagrams welcome.

## Alternatives you considered

What else could solve this? Why is your proposal better?

## Does this need to live in core, or could it be an extension?

See `docs/extending.md`. We prefer extensions over core changes when the use case is niche.

## Anything else

Related issues, references, prior art in other tools.
